scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:preflight
scripts.test:e2e: cd apps/api && python3 -m pytest tests/test_e2e_pipeline.py tests/test_schema_inference.py tests/test_sample_files.py tests/test_catalog_api.py tests/test_connectors_flow.py -v
scripts.loop:enterprise: while true; do npm run test:e2e && npm run build && echo 'ENTERPRISE_LOOP_OK' || echo 'ENTERPRISE_LOOP_FAIL'; sleep 300; done
